patterns.name: Tests Travel with Public Exports
patterns.blessed_solution: Every new public export added to a @stackbilt/* package must have at minimum one test exercising it as a callable function. Add the test in the same PR as the export.
patterns.rationale: Silent export removal is the primary regression vector in OSS packages. A test that imports and calls the function will fail loudly if the export disappears.
anti_patterns: Merging a new exported function with no corresponding test
Adding a type-only export without a runtime test that imports it
Testing implementation details instead of the exported surface
